dependencies: Energy supply dependencies - natural gas, diesel fuel, electricity from local grids
Water supply dependencies for processing operations
Critical equipment and spare parts availability
Single-source power supply contracts (e.g., Bluewaters Power for Boddington expires 2026)
risks: Increased costs due to inflation and tariffs
Supply chain disruptions due to pandemics, geopolitical tensions, trade restrictions
Shortage of critical parts, services and equipment
Local content procurement requirements limiting supplier options
Competition with other natural resource companies for specialized equipment and supplies
Water shortages and surplus from weather/climate impacts

Inflationary pressures on labor, materials, consumables, fuel and energy. Supply chain disruptions from geopolitical and macroeconomic pressures. Transportation industry disruptions. Workforce interruptions. Logistical challenges.

regulatory_risks: Tailings storage facility management regulations (GISTM compliance)
Permitting delays and requirements for environmental impact assessments
Changes in mining laws and investment policies in operating jurisdictions
Mine safety regulations under Federal Mine Safety and Health Act (MSHA)
Environmental taxes (e.g., Zacatecas ecological taxes in Mexico)
Ghana Parliament ratification requirements for mining leases
Canadian consultation requirements with First Nation communities
National Cultural Property preservation requirements in PNG
Mining royalties and tax increases or retroactive claims by governments
Water quality criteria modifications in Peru (MINAM regulations)
Debt Deduction Creation Rules in Australia limiting tax deductibility
Production levies and mineral resource authority fees (e.g., PNG 0.5% production levy)
Water management and discharge requirements becoming increasingly stringent
Income tax regulations and disputes with taxing authorities
Australian capital gains tax disputes (ATO review)
Pillar II global minimum tax of 15%
Aboriginal Cultural Heritage Act compliance in Australia
Reclamation and closure obligations
EPA regulations at Midnite mine site and Dawn mill site
Tailings storage facility regulations and Global Industry Standard on Tailings Management (GISTM) compliance
Climate change regulations and carbon taxation (e.g., Canada carbon tax increasing to C$170/tonne by 2030)
Extensive environmental laws and regulations governing air, water, waste management, and reclamation
Export controls and economic sanctions compliance (U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, UK Bribery Act)
Securities laws and disclosure requirements
Indigenous rights and consultation requirements (e.g., UNDRIP implementation in Canada)
Water quality and discharge requirements becoming increasingly stringent
New regulations on renewable energy and emissions (e.g., Mexico mining reforms, Ghana local content regulations)
Mining permits and regulatory approvals
Water extraction and waste disposal permit requirements
Labor and employment law changes restricting contractor use
Inflation Reduction Act excise tax on stock repurchases
NSW EPA regulations on air emissions at Cadia mine
Cybersecurity and data protection regulations
Environmental regulations governing protection of the environment
Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act mine safety reporting
Potential bans on open pit mining (e.g., proposed reforms in Mexico)
Foreign currency controls in Argentina restricting repatriation

sanction_risks: Political and social developments in Peru affecting Yanacocha operations
Supply chain disruptions from global conflicts
U.S. export control laws and economic sanctions with extraterritorial reach
Hyperinflationary economies in Ghana, Argentina, and Suriname
Foreign currency controls in Argentina restricting payments to foreign entities and repatriation of cash
Potential sanctions impacting operations in certain jurisdictions
Trade restrictions and tariffs affecting equipment and supply imports
Risks from global conflicts affecting trade flows and sanctions (e.g., Ukraine, Russia, Belarus)
Geopolitical and macroeconomic pressures affecting global operations
